title: Lock the Product Contract / Privacy Modes / Domain Model
notes: Start here. Everything else references this document. Block sprint 2 if not done.

title: Design the Report Schema / Evidence Model / Confidence Model
notes: Define JSON schema + sample artifacts. UI and backend both consume this. Blocks RPA-040/041/042/044.

title: Build the Desktop Shell / Navigation / Workspace Lifecycle
notes: Core Electron+React shell. Route structure + workspace CRUD. IPC boundary. Security baseline mandatory here.

title: Design Local Storage / Secure Secrets / Settings Service
notes: SQLite schema + OS keychain. Every provider and code-host ticket depends on this for token storage.

title: Design the LLM Provider Abstraction and Capability Matrix
notes: Pure interface layer. Build this before any adapter. Structured generation must be first-class.

title: Build Job Orchestration / Progress / Cancellation / Resumability
notes: Job state machine + progress panel UI. Required before any long-running pipeline ticket is buildable.

title: Integrate Local Model Connectors (Ollama / LM Studio / Generic)
notes: Ollama + LM Studio adapters. Enables fully offline flow. Local privacy badge in UI.

title: GitHub Integration: Auth / Repository Discovery / Permission Flow
notes: OAuth device flow. Repo listing + search. Secure token storage. Required for RPA-030.

title: Local Folder Import: Open a Local Repository Without a Code Host
notes: [NEW] Folder-picker dialog + git metadata reader. Self-contained Strict Local Mode. No OAuth needed.

title: Repository Clone/Sync Engine with Snapshot Model
notes: Snapshot tied to commit hash. Path locking. Preflight checks. Foundation for all indexing tickets.

title: Repository Setup Screen: Branch / Sync Settings / Per-Repo Ignore Override
notes: [NEW] Branch/ref picker + sync settings + per-repo ignore overrides. Feeds correct inputs into clone and manifest engines.

title: File Manifest / Ignore Engine / Language Detection / Classification
notes: Clean manifest is the gate to all downstream analysis. Custom ignore settings UI (minor).

title: Symbol Extraction and Repo Map Generation (Tree-sitter)
notes: Tree-sitter integration. Symbol records. Repo map artifact. Lexical fallback. Parse coverage stats.

title: Build the Structural Graph: Imports / Boundaries / Entrypoints
notes: Import graph + entrypoint detection + graph metrics. Not MVP but strongly improves analysis quality.

title: Chunking / Embeddings / Lexical Search / Retrieval Layer
notes: Local embeddings by default. Hybrid retrieval. Section-specific retrievers. Not MVP but needed for full quality.

title: Analysis Run Screen: Scan Mode / Privacy Mode Toggle / Progress UX
notes: [NEW] Quick/Full scan selector + Strict Local/BYOK toggle + progress log + post-run summary card.

title: Generate: Project Identity Card / Architecture Overview / Onboarding Digest
notes: First analysis output users see. Accuracy + readability over coverage. Viewer components included.

title: Functionality-to-File Map / Important-Files Radar / Glossary
notes: Feature clustering engine + important file scorer + glossary extractor. Core differentiator.

title: Report Viewer / Evidence Drawer / Export / Compare Runs
notes: Primarily UI. Evidence drawer is the trust anchor—invest heavily here. JSON+Markdown export.

title: Convention/Style Analyzer and Hidden Anti-Pattern Discovery
notes: Convention mining engine. Outlier detection. Key differentiator but comes after core sections.

title: Risk / Complexity / Hotspot Section Generator
notes: [NEW] God object detection + circular import flags + TODO hotspot + blast radius + test gap. Section J of the spec.

title: Integrate Cloud Providers (OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini / DeepSeek)
notes: 4 cloud adapters. Consent banner required before first cloud run. Can move earlier if marketability is priority.

title: Bitbucket Integration: OAuth 2.0 / API Token / SSH Clone Strategy
notes: More complex than GitHub (separate auth vs clone cred). UI must explain token paths clearly.

title: Evaluation Harness / Golden Repos / Quality Gates
notes: 3-5 golden repos + answer keys + smoke test runner. Must exist before calling v1 shippable.

title: Security Hardening / Packaging / Internal Release Readiness
notes: Electron security checklist + packaging for 1 OS + install guide. Do not ship without this.
